name: Creation or Modification of Assistive Technology Applications
notes:
This rule detects creation or modification of Assistive Technology applications.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Mateusz Wydra, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Atbroker Registry Change
SIGMA Description: Detects creation/modification of Assistive Technology applications and persistence with usage of 'at'


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches ( LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%' ) AQL filter query

when the event matches ( LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'atbroker.exe' AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%' AND LOWER("Registry Value Data") == '(empty)' ) OR ( LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\installer\msi%' AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Creation or Modification of Assistive Technology Applications on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%' 	OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%' ) AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches ( 		LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'atbroker.exe' 		AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\configuration%' 		AND LOWER("Registry Value Data") == '(empty)' 	) 	OR 	( 		LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\installer\msi%' 		AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%software\microsoft\windows nt\currentversion\accessibility\ats%' 	) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Creation or Modification of Assistive Technology Applications
Event description: Detects creation or modification of Assistive Technology applications.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
